report.summary: Cycle-close v5: No new commits since e3f63fc. 49 uncommitted files (5 modified, 44 untracked) accumulating — mostly reports and social drafts. All 6 API routes structurally healthy. 3 pages have TS syntax errors. 111 published slugs still missing page.tsx files.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 4 pages from latest commit (e3f63fc) verified: euler-v2-modular-lending, hyperlane-interoperability, crypto-staking, flash-loans — all have Metadata export, JSON-LD structured data, no 'use client' conflicts
StablecoinYieldTracker component present at src/components/StablecoinYieldTracker.tsx
634 published slugs, 1,246 total page.tsx files, 310 learn pages — unchanged from previous cycle
111 published slugs missing page.tsx (17.5%) — mostly dynamic route categories (blog, courses, compare/exchanges)
141 TS errors across 4 files: structured-data.examples.ts (non-code), crypto-arbitrage-strategies, lido-v3-stvaults, rwa-yield-vs-defi-yield — all pre-existing, non-blocking (ignoreBuildErrors: true)
Full build verification blocked by sandbox OOM (expected for 1,246-page site in 8GB sandbox)
No new regressions detected since last cycle — delta is zero new commits

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 public API route files present and structurally sound
/api/prices: HEALTHY — 60s cache, fallback data, rate limiting, X-Cache-Source headers
/api/trending: HEALTHY — 300s cache, stale fallback, catch block present
/api/fear-greed: HEALTHY — 600s cache, stale fallback, catch block present
/api/market-metrics: HEALTHY — 60s cache, mock fallback on error, uses Promise.allSettled
/api/market-dominance: HEALTHY — 300s cache, hardcoded FALLBACK_DATA (only route with this), revalidate=300
/api/defi-yields: WARNING — no hardcoded FALLBACK_DATA, no route-level rate limiting, most vulnerable route to upstream failures
Only 1 of 6 routes (market-dominance) has full resilience pattern (cache + fallback + X-Cache-Source headers). 4 routes missing X-Cache-Source headers, 5 missing FALLBACK_DATA
Live endpoint health unverifiable from sandbox (network egress restricted)

sections.title: DevOps
items: Latest commit: e3f63fc (Apr 2) — feat: 4 new learn guides, 8 OG images, stablecoin yield tracker
No new commits this cycle — no deployment delta

49 uncommitted files accumulating: 5 modified (published-pages.ts, StablecoinYieldTracker.tsx, crypto-portfolio-rebalancing page, package-lock.json, community report) + 44 untracked (reports, social drafts, OG SVGs, audit artifacts)
Vercel CLI not available in sandbox — deployment status unverifiable from here
Build config stable: output=standalone, ignoreBuildErrors=true, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency=4
Recommend: batch commit uncommitted work to avoid drift accumulation

sections.title: Project Manager
items: This cycle shipped: 0 new commits (last commit was e3f63fc from Apr 2 13:24 UTC+2)
Accumulated uncommitted work: modified published-pages.ts (likely 2 new queue entries), StablecoinYieldTracker refinements, crypto-portfolio-rebalancing page updates, 2 new OG images

Carry-over items: (1) Commit accumulated work, (2) Fix 3 pages with TS syntax errors (arbitrage, lido-v3, rwa-yield), (3) Add FALLBACK_DATA to remaining 5 API routes, (4) Add X-Cache-Source headers to 4 API routes
Blockers: None critical. Uncommitted file count (49) is growing — recommend commit + deploy before next feature work
Report accumulation: 30+ report files uncommitted from Apr 2-3 cycles — consider archiving or batch-committing
